ayahArabic: مَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِتَشْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: We have not sent down to you the Qur’ān that you be distressed

ayahArabic: إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: But only as a reminder for those who fear [Allāh] -

ayahArabic: إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: But only as a reminder for those who fear [Allāh] -

targetTranslation: a gradual sending down (as the object being acted upon)
ayahArabic: تَنزِيلًا مِّمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ ٱلْعُلَى
ayahEnglish: A revelation from He who created the earth and highest heavens,

ayahArabic: تَنزِيلًا مِّمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ ٱلْعُلَى
ayahEnglish: A revelation from He who created the earth and highest heavens,

ayahArabic: ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱسْتَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: The Most Merciful [who is] above the Throne established.

ayahArabic: لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and what is between them and what is under the soil.

targetTranslation: between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)
ayahArabic: لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and what is between them and what is under the soil.

ayahArabic: لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and what is between them and what is under the soil.

targetTranslation: you speak loudly/openly (with بِٱلْقَوْلِ - in speech)
ayahArabic: وَإِن تَجْهَرْ بِٱلْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى
ayahEnglish: And if you speak aloud - then indeed, He knows the secret and what is [even] more hidden.

targetTranslation: he knows (the subject of this verb is Allah, who knows السِّرَّ - the secret)
ayahArabic: وَإِن تَجْهَرْ بِٱلْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى
ayahEnglish: And if you speak aloud - then indeed, He knows the secret and what is [even] more hidden.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Allāh - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Allāh - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Allāh - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names.

targetTranslation: has come to you (object of هَلْ)
ayahArabic: وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And has the story of Moses reached you? -

ayahArabic: وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And has the story of Moses reached you? -

ayahArabic: وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And has the story of Moses reached you? -

ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

targetTranslation: all of you stay! (command to group)
ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

targetTranslation: I will bring to you all (addressing Musa's family)
ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

targetTranslation: I find (referring to finding guidance at the fire)
ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

ayahArabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahEnglish: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."

targetTranslation: he came to it/her (referring to the fire mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّآ أَتَىٰهَا نُودِىَ يٰمُوسَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And when he came to it, he was called, "O Moses,

targetTranslation: he was called (before يٰمُوسَىٰٓ - O Moses)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّآ أَتَىٰهَا نُودِىَ يٰمُوسَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And when he came to it, he was called, "O Moses,

ayahArabic: إِنِّىٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the blessed valley of Ṭuwā.

targetTranslation: your Lord (subject of إِنِّي أَنَا - Indeed, I am)
ayahArabic: إِنِّىٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the blessed valley of Ṭuwā.

ayahArabic: إِنِّىٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the blessed valley of Ṭuwā.

targetTranslation: Tuwa (name of sacred valley mentioned in the Quran)
ayahArabic: إِنِّىٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the blessed valley of Ṭuwā.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَا ٱخْتَرْتُكَ فَٱسْتَمِعْ لِمَا يُوحَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And I have chosen you, so listen to what is revealed [to you].

ayahArabic: وَأَنَا ٱخْتَرْتُكَ فَٱسْتَمِعْ لِمَا يُوحَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And I have chosen you, so listen to what is revealed [to you].

targetTranslation: I (the speaker in لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠)
ayahArabic: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I am Allāh. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance.

ayahArabic: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I am Allāh. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance.

targetTranslation: any deity (object of لا/there is no)
ayahArabic: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I am Allāh. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance.

ayahArabic: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I am Allāh. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.

targetTranslation: I am about to (connected to أُخْفِيهَا - I hide it)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.

targetTranslation: I hide it (referring to الساعة/the Hour)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.

targetTranslation: he definitely prevents/blocks you (object of فَلَا)
ayahArabic: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish.

ayahArabic: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish.

ayahArabic: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish.

ayahArabic: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish.

targetTranslation: that (feminine demonstrative pronoun pointing to something far)
ayahArabic: وَمَا تِلْكَ بِيَمِينِكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And what is that in your right hand, O Moses?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."

targetTranslation: my staff (object that Musa uses to lean on)
ayahArabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."

targetTranslation: needs and purposes (as the main subject)
ayahArabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَلْقِهَا يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Throw it down, O Moses."

targetTranslation: throw it! (command to Moses about his staff)
ayahArabic: قَالَ أَلْقِهَا يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Throw it down, O Moses."

ayahArabic: فَأَلْقَىٰهَا فَإِذَا هِىَ حَيَّةٌ تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So he threw it down, and thereupon it was a snake, moving swiftly.

ayahArabic: فَأَلْقَىٰهَا فَإِذَا هِىَ حَيَّةٌ تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So he threw it down, and thereupon it was a snake, moving swiftly.

ayahArabic: فَأَلْقَىٰهَا فَإِذَا هِىَ حَيَّةٌ تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So he threw it down, and thereupon it was a snake, moving swiftly.

ayahArabic: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition.

targetTranslation: take it! (command to one person to take the staff)
ayahArabic: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition.

ayahArabic: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition.

targetTranslation: its/her way (object of سَنُعِيدُ/we will return)

ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition.

ayahArabic: وَٱضْمُمْ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ ءَايَةً أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And draw in your hand to your side; it will come out white without disease - another sign,

ayahEnglish: And draw in your hand to your side; it will come out white without disease - another sign,

ayahEnglish: That We may show you [some] of Our greater signs.

ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed [i.e., tyrannized]."

ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed [i.e., tyrannized]."

ayahEnglish: Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed [i.e., tyrannized]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱشْرَحْ لِى صَدْرِى
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "My Lord, expand [i.e., relax] for me my breast [with assurance]

targetTranslation: O my Lord! (calling upon the Lord)

ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "My Lord, expand [i.e., relax] for me my breast [with assurance]

ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "My Lord, expand [i.e., relax] for me my breast [with assurance]

targetTranslation: my matter/affair (object of يَسِّرْ - make easy)
ayahArabic: وَيَسِّرْ لِىٓ أَمْرِى
ayahEnglish: And ease for me my task

targetTranslation: a knot (that Moses wants untied from his tongue)
ayahArabic: وَٱحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِى
ayahEnglish: And untie the knot from my tongue

ayahArabic: وَٱحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِى
ayahEnglish: And untie the knot from my tongue

ayahArabic: يَفْقَهُوا۟ قَوْلِى
ayahEnglish: That they may understand my speech.

targetTranslation: my speech (object of يَفْقَهُوا - they understand)
ayahArabic: يَفْقَهُوا۟ قَوْلِى
ayahEnglish: That they may understand my speech.

ayahArabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى وَزِيرًا مِّنْ أَهْلِى
ayahEnglish: And appoint for me a minister [i.e., assistant] from my family -

ayahArabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى وَزِيرًا مِّنْ أَهْلِى
ayahEnglish: And appoint for me a minister [i.e., assistant] from my family -

ayahArabic: هٰرُونَ أَخِى
ayahEnglish: Aaron, my brother.

ayahArabic: هٰرُونَ أَخِى
ayahEnglish: Aaron, my brother.

ayahArabic: ٱشْدُدْ بِهِۦٓ أَزْرِى
ayahEnglish: Increase through him my strength

ayahArabic: ٱشْدُدْ بِهِۦٓ أَزْرِى
ayahEnglish: Increase through him my strength

targetTranslation: my matter/affair (object of أَشْرِكْهُ - include him in)
ayahArabic: وَأَشْرِكْهُ فِىٓ أَمْرِى
ayahEnglish: And let him share my task

targetTranslation: we glorify you intensely (acted on by كَىْ)
ayahArabic: كَىْ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيرًا
ayahEnglish: That we may exalt You much

targetTranslation: abundantly (describing how نُسَبِّحَ/we glorify is done)
ayahArabic: كَىْ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيرًا
ayahEnglish: That we may exalt You much

targetTranslation: much (describing how we remember/mention in وَنَذْكُرَكَ)
ayahArabic: وَنَذْكُرَكَ كَثِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And remember You much.

ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, You are of us ever Seeing."

targetTranslation: one who sees deeply/thoroughly (as a description of كُنتَ - you were)
ayahArabic: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, You are of us ever Seeing."

ayahArabic: قَالَ قَدْ أُوتِيتَ سُؤْلَكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "You have been granted your request, O Moses.

targetTranslation: you were given (what يٰمُوسَىٰ asked for)
ayahArabic: قَالَ قَدْ أُوتِيتَ سُؤْلَكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "You have been granted your request, O Moses.

targetTranslation: your request (that was given to you)
ayahArabic: قَالَ قَدْ أُوتِيتَ سُؤْلَكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "You have been granted your request, O Moses.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And We had already conferred favor upon you another time,

targetTranslation: a time, an instance (of أُخْرَىٰٓ - another)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And We had already conferred favor upon you another time,

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And We had already conferred favor upon you another time,

ayahArabic: إِذْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired,

ayahArabic: إِذْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired,

ayahEnglish: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired,

ayahEnglish: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired,

ayahEnglish: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired,

targetTranslation: throw him! (to a female) (into التَّابُوتِ - the chest)
ayahArabic: أَنِ ٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلتَّابُوتِ فَٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ فَلْيُلْقِهِ ٱلْيَمُّ بِٱلسَّاحِلِ يَأْخُذْهُ عَدُوٌّ لِّى وَعَدُوٌّ لَّهُۥ وَأَلْقَيْتُ عَلَيْكَ مَحَبَّةً مِّنِّى وَلِتُصْنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيْنِىٓ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], 'Cast him into the chest and cast it into the river, and the river will throw it onto the bank; there will take him an enemy to Me and an enemy to him.' And I bestowed upon you love from Me that you would be brought up under My eye [i.e., observation and care].

targetTranslation: he takes/will take him (object of فَلْيُلْقِهِ)

ayahEnglish: [Saying], 'Cast him into the chest and cast it into the river, and the river will throw it onto the bank; there will take him an enemy to Me and an enemy to him.' And I bestowed upon you love from Me that you would be brought up under My eye [i.e., observation and care].

ayahArabic: إِذْ تَمْشِىٓ أُخْتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكْفُلُهُۥ فَرَجَعْنٰكَ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ كَىْ تَقَرَّ عَيْنُهَا وَلَا تَحْزَنَ وَقَتَلْتَ نَفْسًا فَنَجَّيْنٰكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّاكَ فُتُونًا فَلَبِثْتَ سِنِينَ فِىٓ أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئْتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرٍ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [And We favored you] when your sister went and said, 'Shall I direct you to someone who will be responsible for him?' So We restored you to your mother that she might be content and not grieve. And you killed someone, but We saved you from retaliation and tried you with a [severe] trial. And you remained [some] years among the people of Madyan. Then you came [here] at the decreed time, O Moses.

ayahArabic: إِذْ تَمْشِىٓ أُخْتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكْفُلُهُۥ فَرَجَعْنٰكَ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ كَىْ تَقَرَّ عَيْنُهَا وَلَا تَحْزَنَ وَقَتَلْتَ نَفْسًا فَنَجَّيْنٰكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّاكَ فُتُونًا فَلَبِثْتَ سِنِينَ فِىٓ أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئْتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرٍ يٰمُوسَىٰ

distractors: and he got [both of] them out

targetTranslation: who/whoever (introduces the person who يَكْفُلُهُۥ - would take care of him)
ayahArabic: إِذْ تَمْشِىٓ أُخْتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكْفُلُهُۥ فَرَجَعْنٰكَ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ كَىْ تَقَرَّ عَيْنُهَا وَلَا تَحْزَنَ وَقَتَلْتَ نَفْسًا فَنَجَّيْنٰكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّاكَ فُتُونًا فَلَبِثْتَ سِنِينَ فِىٓ أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئْتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرٍ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [And We favored you] when your sister went and said, 'Shall I direct you to someone who will be responsible for him?' So We restored you to your mother that she might be content and not grieve. And you killed someone, but We saved you from retaliation and tried you with a [severe] trial. And you remained [some] years among the people of Madyan. Then you came [here] at the decreed time, O Moses.

So We restored you to your mother that she might be content and not grieve. And you killed someone, but We saved you from retaliation and tried you with a [severe] trial. And you remained [some] years among the people of Madyan. Then you came [here] at the decreed time, O Moses.

ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَا تَنِيَا فِى ذِكْرِى
ayahEnglish: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance.

targetTranslation: you (when talking to one male) (subject of اذْهَبْ - go)
ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَا تَنِيَا فِى ذِكْرِى
ayahEnglish: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance.

targetTranslation: you both weaken (addressing Moses and Aaron)
ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَا تَنِيَا فِى ذِكْرِى
ayahEnglish: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance.

ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايٰتِى وَلَا تَنِيَا فِى ذِكْرِى
ayahEnglish: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance.

ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Go, both of you, to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.

targetTranslation: Pharaoh (as the object of اذْهَبَا إِلَى - go to)
ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Go, both of you, to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.

targetTranslation: he transgressed (subject of إِنَّهُۥ - indeed he)
ayahArabic: ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Go, both of you, to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.

ayahArabic: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوْلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allāh]."

targetTranslation: very gently/softly (as the manner of speaking)
ayahArabic: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوْلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allāh]."

ayahArabic: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوْلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allāh]."

ayahArabic: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوْلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allāh]."

targetTranslation: they both said (to رَبَّنَا - our Lord)
ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَآ أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, indeed we are afraid that he will hasten [punishment] against us or that he will transgress."

targetTranslation: Oh our Lord! (calling out to Him)
ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَآ أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, indeed we are afraid that he will hasten [punishment] against us or that he will transgress."

targetTranslation: we fear (of أَن يَفْرُطَ - that he will exceed)
ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَآ أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, indeed we are afraid that he will hasten [punishment] against us or that he will transgress."

ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَآ أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, indeed we are afraid that he will hasten [punishment] against us or that he will transgress."

ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَآ أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, indeed we are afraid that he will hasten [punishment] against us or that he will transgress."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ إِنَّنِى مَعَكُمَآ أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see.

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ إِنَّنِى مَعَكُمَآ أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see.

targetTranslation: with you two (addressed in قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ - He said: Do not fear)
ayahArabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ إِنَّنِى مَعَكُمَآ أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see.

targetTranslation: I hear/listen (present tense, in this ayah showing Allah speaking)
ayahArabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ إِنَّنِى مَعَكُمَآ أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see.

ayahArabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ قَدْ جِئْنٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَٱلسَّلٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance.

ayahArabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ قَدْ جِئْنٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَٱلسَّلٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance.

ayahArabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ قَدْ جِئْنٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَٱلسَّلٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance.

ayahArabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ قَدْ جِئْنٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَٱلسَّلٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance.

targetTranslation: Israel (the prophet Jacob, as the object of بَنِى/children of)
ayahArabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ قَدْ جِئْنٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَٱلسَّلٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance.

targetTranslation: you punish them intensively (in context of فَقُولَآ - 'and you both say')
ayahArabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ قَدْ جِئْنٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَٱلسَّلٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance.

ayahArabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ قَدْ جِئْنٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَٱلسَّلٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance.

targetTranslation: it was revealed (subject of قَدْ in إِنَّا قَدْ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا قَدْ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْنَآ أَنَّ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it has been revealed to us that the punishment will be upon whoever denies and turns away.'"

ayahArabic: إِنَّا قَدْ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْنَآ أَنَّ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it has been revealed to us that the punishment will be upon whoever denies and turns away.'"

targetTranslation: he denied repeatedly/strongly (the warning of punishment mentioned in أَنَّ ٱلْعَذَابَ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا قَدْ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْنَآ أَنَّ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it has been revealed to us that the punishment will be upon whoever denies and turns away.'"

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَمَن رَّبُّكُمَا يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Pharaoh] said, "So who is the Lord of you two, O Moses?"

targetTranslation: your (both of you) lord (addressing Moses and Aaron)
ayahArabic: قَالَ فَمَن رَّبُّكُمَا يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Pharaoh] said, "So who is the Lord of you two, O Moses?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبُّنَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلْقَهُۥ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]."

targetTranslation: our Lord (subject of قَالَ - he said)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبُّنَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلْقَهُۥ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبُّنَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلْقَهُۥ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ

targetTranslation: its creation (what was given to everything)

ayahEnglish: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]."

ayahEnglish: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ ٱلْقُرُونِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Pharaoh] said, "Then what is the case of the former generations?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ ٱلْقُرُونِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Pharaoh] said, "Then what is the case of the former generations?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ عِلْمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّى فِى كِتٰبٍ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّى وَلَا يَنسَى
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "The knowledge thereof is with my Lord in a record. My Lord neither errs nor forgets."

targetTranslation: its knowledge (subject of قَالَ - he said)
ayahArabic: قَالَ عِلْمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّى فِى كِتٰبٍ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّى وَلَا يَنسَى
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "The knowledge thereof is with my Lord in a record. My Lord neither errs nor forgets."

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.

targetTranslation: he made/set (subject of الَّذِى - the One who)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.

targetTranslation: a cradle, spread-out place (as object of جَعَلَ)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.

targetTranslation: paths/ways (object of سَلَكَ - made for you)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.

targetTranslation: water (object of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)

ayahEnglish: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.

ayahEnglish: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱرْعَوْا۟ أَنْعٰمَكُمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Eat [therefrom] and pasture your livestock. Indeed in that are signs for those of intelligence.

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱرْعَوْا۟ أَنْعٰمَكُمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Eat [therefrom] and pasture your livestock. Indeed in that are signs for those of intelligence.

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱرْعَوْا۟ أَنْعٰمَكُمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Eat [therefrom] and pasture your livestock. Indeed in that are signs for those of intelligence.

targetTranslation: We created you all (referring to all humans)
ayahArabic: مِنْهَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: From it [i.e., the earth] We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time.

ayahArabic: مِنْهَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: From it [i.e., the earth] We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time.

targetTranslation: we bring you all out (from the earth, as mentioned in مِنْهَا)
ayahArabic: مِنْهَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: From it [i.e., the earth] We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time.

ayahArabic: مِنْهَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: From it [i.e., the earth] We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time.

ayahArabic: مِنْهَا خَلَقْنٰكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: From it [i.e., the earth] We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرَيْنٰهُ ءَايٰتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly showed him [i.e., Pharaoh] Our signs - all of them - but he denied and refused.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرَيْنٰهُ ءَايٰتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly showed him [i.e., Pharaoh] Our signs - all of them - but he denied and refused.

targetTranslation: all of them (referring to Our signs)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرَيْنٰهُ ءَايٰتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly showed him [i.e., Pharaoh] Our signs - all of them - but he denied and refused.

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتُخْرِجَنَا مِنْ أَرْضِنَا بِسِحْرِكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Have you come to us to drive us out of our land with your magic, O Moses?

targetTranslation: did you come to us? (subject of قَالَ)
ayahArabic: قَالَ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتُخْرِجَنَا مِنْ أَرْضِنَا بِسِحْرِكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Have you come to us to drive us out of our land with your magic, O Moses?

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتُخْرِجَنَا مِنْ أَرْضِنَا بِسِحْرِكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Have you come to us to drive us out of our land with your magic, O Moses?

targetTranslation: like it/similar to it (referring to سِحْر/magic)
ayahArabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahEnglish: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."

ayahArabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahEnglish: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."

ayahArabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahEnglish: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."

targetTranslation: we will break it (the مَوْعِدًا - appointment)
ayahArabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahEnglish: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."

targetTranslation: we (as the subject of نُخْلِفُهُ - we break it)
ayahArabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahEnglish: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."

ayahArabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahEnglish: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."

targetTranslation: a place (that we should make neutral between us)
ayahArabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahEnglish: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."

ayahArabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahEnglish: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."

ayahArabic: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحًى
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "Your appointment is on the day of the festival when the people assemble at mid-morning."

ayahArabic: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحًى
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "Your appointment is on the day of the festival when the people assemble at mid-morning."

ayahArabic: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحًى
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "Your appointment is on the day of the festival when the people assemble at mid-morning."

ayahArabic: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحًى
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "Your appointment is on the day of the festival when the people assemble at mid-morning."

targetTranslation: morning time (when Moses agreed to meet)
ayahArabic: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحًى
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "Your appointment is on the day of the festival when the people assemble at mid-morning."

targetTranslation: Pharaoh (as the subject who turned away in فَتَوَلَّىٰ)
ayahArabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيْدَهُۥ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So Pharaoh went away, put together his plan, and then came [to Moses].

ayahArabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيْدَهُۥ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So Pharaoh went away, put together his plan, and then came [to Moses].

targetTranslation: he came (after فَجَمَعَ - then he gathered)
ayahArabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيْدَهُۥ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So Pharaoh went away, put together his plan, and then came [to Moses].

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

targetTranslation: woe to you! (warning to the people Musa is addressing)
ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

targetTranslation: a lie (object of تَفْتَرُوا - to fabricate)
ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

targetTranslation: he invented falsely (subject of خَابَ - failed/lost)
ayahArabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Moses said to them [i.e., the magicians summoned by Pharaoh], "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allāh or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."

ayahArabic: فَتَنٰزَعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ وَأَسَرُّوا۟ ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So they disputed over their affair among themselves and concealed their private conversation.

targetTranslation: between them (referring to the magicians who are discussing their plan)
ayahArabic: فَتَنٰزَعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ وَأَسَرُّوا۟ ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So they disputed over their affair among themselves and concealed their private conversation.

ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هٰذٰنِ لَسٰحِرٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلْمُثْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way [i.e., religion or tradition].

targetTranslation: they both want (referring to هٰذٰنِ/these two)
ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هٰذٰنِ لَسٰحِرٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلْمُثْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way [i.e., religion or tradition].

targetTranslation: those two make you all exit
ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هٰذٰنِ لَسٰحِرٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلْمُثْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way [i.e., religion or tradition].

targetTranslation: your (all of you) land (that Pharaoh's people are speaking about to each other)
ayahArabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هٰذٰنِ لَسٰحِرٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلْمُثْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way [i.e., religion or tradition].

targetTranslation: your (plural) plot/scheme (object of فَأَجْمِعُوا - so gather)
ayahArabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّا وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."

ayahArabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّا وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."

targetTranslation: in a row/line (describing how they should come)
ayahArabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّا وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."

ayahArabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّا وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."

ayahArabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّا وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."

ayahArabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّا وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."

targetTranslation: that we be (after أَن in أَن نَّكُونَ)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."

targetTranslation: first (in the sequence of مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ - who threw)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."

targetTranslation: who (asking about the person who will throw first)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."

ayahArabic: قَالَ بَلْ أَلْقُوا۟ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمْ وَعِصِيُّهُمْ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيْهِ مِن سِحْرِهِمْ أَنَّهَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Rather, you throw." And suddenly their ropes and staffs seemed to him from their magic that they were moving [like snakes].

targetTranslation: all of you throw! (command to a group)
ayahArabic: قَالَ بَلْ أَلْقُوا۟ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمْ وَعِصِيُّهُمْ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيْهِ مِن سِحْرِهِمْ أَنَّهَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Rather, you throw." And suddenly their ropes and staffs seemed to him from their magic that they were moving [like snakes].

ayahEnglish: He said, "Rather, you throw." And suddenly their ropes and staffs seemed to him from their magic that they were moving [like snakes].

ayahArabic: فَأَوْجَسَ فِى نَفْسِهِۦ خِيفَةً مُّوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And he sensed within himself apprehension, did Moses.

targetTranslation: a state of fear (object of أَوْجَسَ/felt)
ayahArabic: فَأَوْجَسَ فِى نَفْسِهِۦ خِيفَةً مُّوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And he sensed within himself apprehension, did Moses.

ayahArabic: فَأَوْجَسَ فِى نَفْسِهِۦ خِيفَةً مُّوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And he sensed within himself apprehension, did Moses.

ayahArabic: قُلْنَا لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: We [i.e., Allāh] said, "Fear not. Indeed, it is you who are superior.

ayahArabic: قُلْنَا لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: We [i.e., Allāh] said, "Fear not. Indeed, it is you who are superior.

ayahArabic: قُلْنَا لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: We [i.e., Allāh] said, "Fear not. Indeed, it is you who are superior.

targetTranslation: that which (object of تَلْقَفْ - it will swallow)
ayahArabic: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِى يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا۟ كَيْدُ سٰحِرٍ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is."

ayahArabic: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِى يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا۟ كَيْدُ سٰحِرٍ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is."

ayahArabic: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِى يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا۟ كَيْدُ سٰحِرٍ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is."

targetTranslation: what/that which (refers to what is in يَمِينِكَ)

ayahArabic: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِى يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا۟ كَيْدُ سٰحِرٍ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is."

ayahArabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses."

ayahArabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses."

targetTranslation: we believed (said by the magicians to Pharaoh)
ayahArabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses."

ayahArabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses."

ayahArabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ فِى جُذُوعِ ٱلنَّخْلِ وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَآ أَشَدُّ عَذَابًا وَأَبْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed him [i.e., Moses] before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic. So I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will crucify you on the trunks of palm trees, and you will surely know which of us is more severe in [giving] punishment and more enduring."

ayahArabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ فِى جُذُوعِ ٱلنَّخْلِ وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَآ أَشَدُّ عَذَابًا وَأَبْقَىٰ

ayahArabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ فِى جُذُوعِ ٱلنَّخْلِ وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَآ أَشَدُّ عَذَابًا وَأَبْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed him [i.e., Moses] before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic. So I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will crucify you on the trunks of palm trees, and you will surely know which of us is more severe in [giving] punishment and more enduring."

So I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will crucify you on the trunks of palm trees, and you will surely know which of us is more severe in [giving] punishment and more enduring."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ لَن نُّؤْثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَآءَنَا مِنَ ٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ وَٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنَا فَٱقْضِ مَآ أَنتَ قَاضٍ إِنَّمَا تَقْضِى هٰذِهِ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَآ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Never will we prefer you over what has come to us of clear proofs and [over] He who created us. So decree whatever you are to decree. You can only decree for this worldly life.

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ لَن نُّؤْثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَآءَنَا مِنَ ٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ وَٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنَا فَٱقْضِ مَآ أَنتَ قَاضٍ إِنَّمَا تَقْضِى هٰذِهِ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَآ

ayahEnglish: They said, "Never will we prefer you over what has come to us of clear proofs and [over] He who created us. So decree whatever you are to decree. You can only decree for this worldly life.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطٰيٰنَا وَمَآ أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحْرِ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allāh is better and more enduring."

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطٰيٰنَا وَمَآ أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحْرِ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allāh is better and more enduring."

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطٰيٰنَا وَمَآ أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحْرِ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allāh is better and more enduring."

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطٰيٰنَا وَمَآ أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحْرِ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allāh is better and more enduring."

ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَأْتِ رَبَّهُۥ مُجْرِمًا فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, whoever comes to his Lord as a criminal - indeed, for him is Hell; he will neither die therein nor live.

targetTranslation: he comes (after إِنَّهُۥ مَن - indeed whoever)

ayahEnglish: Indeed, whoever comes to his Lord as a criminal - indeed, for him is Hell; he will neither die therein nor live.

ayahEnglish: Indeed, whoever comes to his Lord as a criminal - indeed, for him is Hell; he will neither die therein nor live.

targetTranslation: he comes to him (predicate of مَن)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَأْتِهِۦ مُؤْمِنًا قَدْ عَمِلَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ ٱلدَّرَجٰتُ ٱلْعُلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: But whoever comes to Him as a believer having done righteous deeds - for those will be the highest degrees [in position]:

targetTranslation: a believer (as someone who comes to Allah in the ayah)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَأْتِهِۦ مُؤْمِنًا قَدْ عَمِلَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ ٱلدَّرَجٰتُ ٱلْعُلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: But whoever comes to Him as a believer having done righteous deeds - for those will be the highest degrees [in position]:

ayahEnglish: But whoever comes to Him as a believer having done righteous deeds - for those will be the highest degrees [in position]:

ayahArabic: جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا وَذٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. And that is the reward of one who purifies himself.

ayahArabic: جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا وَذٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. And that is the reward of one who purifies himself.

ayahArabic: جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا وَذٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
ayahEnglish: Gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. And that is the reward of one who purifies himself.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."

targetTranslation: travel at night! (command to Prophet Moses)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."

targetTranslation: being caught up with (object of لَّا تَخٰفُ - you do not fear)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."

ayahArabic: فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِۦ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ
ayahEnglish: So Pharaoh pursued them with his soldiers, and there covered them from the sea that which covered them,

ayahArabic: فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِۦ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ
ayahEnglish: So Pharaoh pursued them with his soldiers, and there covered them from the sea that which covered them,

targetTranslation: he covered/overwhelmed them (referring to Pharaoh's forces being overwhelmed by the sea)
ayahArabic: فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِۦ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ
ayahEnglish: So Pharaoh pursued them with his soldiers, and there covered them from the sea that which covered them,

ayahArabic: وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُۥ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide [them].

targetTranslation: his people (being led astray by فِرْعَوْنُ)
ayahArabic: وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُۥ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide [them].

ayahArabic: وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُۥ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide [them].

targetTranslation: Israel (being addressed in يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ - O Children of Israel)
ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ قَدْ أَنجَيْنٰكُم مِّنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَوٰعَدْنٰكُمْ جَانِبَ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنَ وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, We delivered you from your enemy, and We made an appointment with you at the right side of the mount, and We sent down to you manna and quails,

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ قَدْ أَنجَيْنٰكُم مِّنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَوٰعَدْنٰكُمْ جَانِبَ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنَ وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, We delivered you from your enemy, and We made an appointment with you at the right side of the mount, and We sent down to you manna and quails,

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ قَدْ أَنجَيْنٰكُم مِّنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَوٰعَدْنٰكُمْ جَانِبَ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنَ وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, We delivered you from your enemy, and We made an appointment with you at the right side of the mount, and We sent down to you manna and quails,

targetTranslation: one who goes to the side
ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ قَدْ أَنجَيْنٰكُم مِّنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَوٰعَدْنٰكُمْ جَانِبَ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنَ وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, We delivered you from your enemy, and We made an appointment with you at the right side of the mount, and We sent down to you manna and quails,

targetTranslation: eat! (command to group) (followed by مِن طَيِّبٰتِ - from the good things)
ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

targetTranslation: good things, pure things (object of كُلُوا)
ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

targetTranslation: what (connects رَزَقْنٰكُمْ to what comes before)
ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

targetTranslation: we provided you all (command object of كُلُوا - eat)
ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen [i.e., perished]."

targetTranslation: he returned back (from wrong to right)
ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى لَغَفَّارٌ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صٰلِحًا ثُمَّ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance.

ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى لَغَفَّارٌ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صٰلِحًا ثُمَّ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance.

ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى لَغَفَّارٌ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صٰلِحًا ثُمَّ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَعْجَلَكَ عَن قَوْمِكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "And what made you hasten from your people, O Moses?"

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَعْجَلَكَ عَن قَوْمِكَ يٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "And what made you hasten from your people, O Moses?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ هُمْ أُو۟لَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِى وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased."

targetTranslation: they/them (referring to the people who went astray in this ayah)
ayahArabic: قَالَ هُمْ أُو۟لَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِى وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased."

targetTranslation: those (pointing to people or things) (subject of عَلَىٰٓ)
ayahArabic: قَالَ هُمْ أُو۟لَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِى وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هُمْ أُو۟لَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِى وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased."

ayahArabic: قَالَ هُمْ أُو۟لَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِى وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِنۢ بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Sāmirī has led them astray."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِنۢ بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Sāmirī has led them astray."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِنۢ بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Sāmirī has led them astray."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِنۢ بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Sāmirī has led them astray."

ayahArabic: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبٰنَ أَسِفًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا أَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِى
ayahEnglish: So Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved. He said, "O my people, did your Lord not make you a good promise? Then, was the time [of its fulfillment] too long for you, or did you wish that wrath from your Lord descend upon you, so you broke your promise [of obedience] to me?"

ayahArabic: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبٰنَ أَسِفًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا أَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِى
ayahEnglish: So Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved. He said, "O my people, did your Lord not make you a good promise? Then, was the time [of its fulfillment] too long for you, or did you wish that wrath from your Lord descend upon you, so you broke your promise [of obedience] to me?"

ayahArabic: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبٰنَ أَسِفًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا أَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِى
ayahEnglish: So Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved. He said, "O my people, did your Lord not make you a good promise? Then, was the time [of its fulfillment] too long for you, or did you wish that wrath from your Lord descend upon you, so you broke your promise [of obedience] to me?"

ayahArabic: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبٰنَ أَسِفًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا أَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِى

ayahEnglish: So Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved. He said, "O my people, did your Lord not make you a good promise? Then, was the time [of its fulfillment] too long for you, or did you wish that wrath from your Lord descend upon you, so you broke your promise [of obedience] to me?"

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَخْلَفْنَا مَوْعِدَكَ بِمَلْكِنَا وَلٰكِنَّا حُمِّلْنَآ أَوْزَارًا مِّن زِينَةِ ٱلْقَوْمِ فَقَذَفْنٰهَا فَكَذٰلِكَ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
ayahEnglish: They said, "We did not break our promise to you by our will, but we were made to carry burdens from the ornaments of the people [of Pharaoh], so we threw them [into the fire], and thus did the Sāmirī throw."

targetTranslation: we broke (subject of قَالُوا - they said)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَخْلَفْنَا مَوْعِدَكَ بِمَلْكِنَا وَلٰكِنَّا حُمِّلْنَآ أَوْزَارًا مِّن زِينَةِ ٱلْقَوْمِ فَقَذَفْنٰهَا فَكَذٰلِكَ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
ayahEnglish: They said, "We did not break our promise to you by our will, but we were made to carry burdens from the ornaments of the people [of Pharaoh], so we threw them [into the fire], and thus did the Sāmirī throw."

targetTranslation: a calf (object of أَخْرَجَ - he brought out)
ayahArabic: فَأَخْرَجَ لَهُمْ عِجْلًا جَسَدًا لَّهُۥ خُوَارٌ فَقَالُوا۟ هٰذَآ إِلٰهُكُمْ وَإِلٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِىَ
ayahEnglish: And he extracted for them [the statue of] a calf which had a lowing sound, and they said, "This is your god and the god of Moses, but he forgot."

targetTranslation: a body (object of أَخْرَجَ - he brought out)
ayahArabic: فَأَخْرَجَ لَهُمْ عِجْلًا جَسَدًا لَّهُۥ خُوَارٌ فَقَالُوا۟ هٰذَآ إِلٰهُكُمْ وَإِلٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِىَ
ayahEnglish: And he extracted for them [the statue of] a calf which had a lowing sound, and they said, "This is your god and the god of Moses, but he forgot."

targetTranslation: Then do they not...? (introduces a rhetorical question)
ayahArabic: أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَلَّا يَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَوْلًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُ لَهُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا
ayahEnglish: Did they not see that it could not return to them any speech [i.e., response] and that it did not possess for them any harm or benefit?

ayahArabic: أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَلَّا يَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَوْلًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُ لَهُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا

ayahEnglish: Did they not see that it could not return to them any speech [i.e., response] and that it did not possess for them any harm or benefit?

ayahArabic: أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَلَّا يَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَوْلًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُ لَهُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا
ayahEnglish: Did they not see that it could not return to them any speech [i.e., response] and that it did not possess for them any harm or benefit?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ قَالَ لَهُمْ هٰرُونُ مِن قَبْلُ يٰقَوْمِ إِنَّمَا فُتِنتُم بِهِۦ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ فَٱتَّبِعُونِى وَأَطِيعُوٓا۟ أَمْرِى
ayahEnglish: And Aaron had already told them before [the return of Moses], "O my people, you are only being tested by it, and indeed, your Lord is the Most Merciful, so follow me and obey my order."

ayahArabic: قَالَ يَبْنَؤُمَّ لَا تَأْخُذْ بِلِحْيَتِى وَلَا بِرَأْسِىٓ إِنِّى خَشِيتُ أَن تَقُولَ فَرَّقْتَ بَيْنَ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَمْ تَرْقُبْ قَوْلِى
ayahEnglish: [Aaron] said, "O son of my mother, do not seize [me] by my beard or by my head. Indeed, I feared that you would say, 'You caused division among the Children of Israel, and you did not observe [or await] my word.'"

ayahArabic: قَالَ يَبْنَؤُمَّ لَا تَأْخُذْ بِلِحْيَتِى وَلَا بِرَأْسِىٓ إِنِّى خَشِيتُ أَن تَقُولَ فَرَّقْتَ بَيْنَ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَلَمْ تَرْقُبْ قَوْلِى

ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "And what is your case, O Sāmirī?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ بَصُرْتُ بِمَا لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا۟ بِهِۦ فَقَبَضْتُ قَبْضَةً مِّنْ أَثَرِ ٱلرَّسُولِ فَنَبَذْتُهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتْ لِى نَفْسِى
ayahEnglish: He said, "I saw what they did not see, so I took a handful [of dust] from the track of the messenger and threw it, and thus did my soul entice me."

targetTranslation: I became perceptive/insightful (about مَا لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا۟ - what they did not perceive)

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّن تُخْلَفَهُۥ وَٱنظُرْ إِلَىٰٓ إِلٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِى ظَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفًا لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ نَسْفًا
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "Then go. And indeed, it is [decreed] for you in [this] life to say, 'No contact.' And indeed, you have an appointment [in the Hereafter] you will not fail to keep. And look at your 'god' to which you remained devoted. We will surely burn it and blow it [i.e., its ashes] into the sea with a blast.
