ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "Then go. And indeed, it is [decreed] for you in [this] life to say, 'No contact.' And indeed, you have an appointment [in the Hereafter] you will not fail to keep. And look at your 'god' to which you remained devoted. We will surely burn it and blow it [i.e., its ashes] into the sea with a blast.

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّن تُخْلَفَهُۥ وَٱنظُرْ إِلَىٰٓ إِلٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِى ظَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفًا لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ نَسْفًا
ayahEnglish: [Moses] said, "Then go. And indeed, it is [decreed] for you in [this] life to say, 'No contact.' And indeed, you have an appointment [in the Hereafter] you will not fail to keep. And look at your 'god' to which you remained devoted. We will surely burn it and blow it [i.e., its ashes] into the sea with a blast.

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّن تُخْلَفَهُۥ وَٱنظُرْ إِلَىٰٓ إِلٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِى ظَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفًا لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ نَسْفًا

And look at your 'god' to which you remained devoted. We will surely burn it and blow it [i.e., its ashes] into the sea with a blast.

targetTranslation: your (all of you) god (subject of this sentence)
ayahArabic: إِنَّمَآ إِلٰهُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: Your god is only Allāh, except for whom there is no deity. He has encompassed all things in knowledge."

ayahArabic: كَذٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ مَا قَدْ سَبَقَ وَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنٰكَ مِن لَّدُنَّا ذِكْرًا
ayahEnglish: Thus, [O Muḥammad], We relate to you from the news of what has preceded. And We have certainly given you from Us a message [i.e., the Qur’ān].

targetTranslation: of the news (multiple pieces) (part of مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ - from the news of)

ayahEnglish: Thus, [O Muḥammad], We relate to you from the news of what has preceded. And We have certainly given you from Us a message [i.e., the Qur’ān].

ayahArabic: مَّنْ أَعْرَضَ عَنْهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَحْمِلُ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ وِزْرًا
ayahEnglish: Whoever turns away from it - then indeed, he will bear on the Day of Resurrection a burden [i.e., great sin],

targetTranslation: he turned away (from عَنْهُ - from it)

ayahEnglish: Whoever turns away from it - then indeed, he will bear on the Day of Resurrection a burden [i.e., great sin],

targetTranslation: a burden (object of يَحْمِلُ - he carries)

targetTranslation: those who stay permanently (describing their state in فِيهِ - in it)
ayahArabic: خٰلِدِينَ فِيهِ وَسَآءَ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ حِمْلًا
ayahEnglish: [Abiding] eternally therein, and evil it is for them on the Day of Resurrection as a load -

targetTranslation: day (object of سَآءَ - it was bad)
ayahArabic: خٰلِدِينَ فِيهِ وَسَآءَ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ حِمْلًا
ayahEnglish: [Abiding] eternally therein, and evil it is for them on the Day of Resurrection as a load -

targetTranslation: a burden (as something being carried on the Day of Judgment)
ayahArabic: خٰلِدِينَ فِيهِ وَسَآءَ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ حِمْلًا
ayahEnglish: [Abiding] eternally therein, and evil it is for them on the Day of Resurrection as a load -

targetTranslation: on the day (when يُنفَخُ - it is blown)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ وَنَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍ زُرْقًا
ayahEnglish: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed.

targetTranslation: it is blown (into الصُّورِ - the horn)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ وَنَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍ زُرْقًا
ayahEnglish: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed.

targetTranslation: on that day (when يُنفَخُ - is blown)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ وَنَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍ زُرْقًا
ayahEnglish: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed.

targetTranslation: blue-eyed ones (object of وَنَحْشُرُ/we will gather)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ وَنَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍ زُرْقًا
ayahEnglish: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed.

ayahArabic: يَتَخٰفَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًا
ayahEnglish: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]."

targetTranslation: between them (whispering to each other in يَتَخٰفَتُونَ)
ayahArabic: يَتَخٰفَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًا
ayahEnglish: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]."

ayahArabic: يَتَخٰفَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًا
ayahEnglish: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]."

ayahArabic: يَتَخٰفَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًا
ayahEnglish: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]."

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner [i.e., wisdom or speech] will say, "You remained not but one day."

ayahArabic: وَيَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلْجِبَالِ فَقُلْ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّى نَسْفًا
ayahEnglish: And they ask you about the mountains, so say, "My Lord will blow them away with a blast.

ayahArabic: وَيَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلْجِبَالِ فَقُلْ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّى نَسْفًا
ayahEnglish: And they ask you about the mountains, so say, "My Lord will blow them away with a blast.

ayahArabic: وَيَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلْجِبَالِ فَقُلْ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّى نَسْفًا
ayahEnglish: And they ask you about the mountains, so say, "My Lord will blow them away with a blast.

targetTranslation: a flat ground (object of فَيَذَرُهَا - so He will leave it)
ayahArabic: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفْصَفًا
ayahEnglish: And He will leave it [i.e., the earth] a level plain;

targetTranslation: completely leveled and smooth (describing how Allah will leave the earth in this ayah)
ayahArabic: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفْصَفًا
ayahEnglish: And He will leave it [i.e., the earth] a level plain;

ayahArabic: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَآ أَمْتًا
ayahEnglish: You will not see therein a depression or an elevation."

targetTranslation: any crookedness (object of تَرَىٰ - you will see)
ayahArabic: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَآ أَمْتًا
ayahEnglish: You will not see therein a depression or an elevation."

ayahArabic: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَآ أَمْتًا
ayahEnglish: You will not see therein a depression or an elevation."
distractors: (even as much as) a hair on a date-seed

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِىَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, they [i.e., everyone] will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps].

targetTranslation: they follow intensely/closely (subject of لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِىَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, they [i.e., everyone] will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps].

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِىَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, they [i.e., everyone] will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps].

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِىَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, they [i.e., everyone] will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps].

targetTranslation: a soft sound/whisper (as the thing being heard)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِىَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, they [i.e., everyone] will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps].

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَرَضِىَ لَهُۥ قَوْلًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَرَضِىَ لَهُۥ قَوْلًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَرَضِىَ لَهُۥ قَوْلًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَرَضِىَ لَهُۥ قَوْلًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَرَضِىَ لَهُۥ قَوْلًا
ayahEnglish: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word.

targetTranslation: he knows (subject of مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ)
ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it [i.e., what He knows] in knowledge.

targetTranslation: that which (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it [i.e., what He knows] in knowledge.

ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it [i.e., what He knows] in knowledge.

targetTranslation: their hands (what is in front of them)
ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it [i.e., what He knows] in knowledge.

targetTranslation: behind them (what is after يَعْلَمُ مَا)
ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it [i.e., what He knows] in knowledge.

ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it [i.e., what He knows] in knowledge.

ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: He [i.e., Allāh] knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it [i.e., what He knows] in knowledge.

ayahArabic: وَعَنَتِ ٱلْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَىِّ ٱلْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
ayahEnglish: And [all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining. And he will have failed who carries injustice.

ayahArabic: وَعَنَتِ ٱلْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَىِّ ٱلْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
ayahEnglish: And [all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining. And he will have failed who carries injustice.

ayahArabic: وَعَنَتِ ٱلْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَىِّ ٱلْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
ayahEnglish: And [all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining. And he will have failed who carries injustice.

targetTranslation: wrongdoing (as the object being carried in حَمَلَ)
ayahArabic: وَعَنَتِ ٱلْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَىِّ ٱلْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
ayahEnglish: And [all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining. And he will have failed who carries injustice.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًا وَلَا هَضْمًا
ayahEnglish: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًا وَلَا هَضْمًا
ayahEnglish: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًا وَلَا هَضْمًا
ayahEnglish: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation.

ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًا وَلَا هَضْمًا
ayahEnglish: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation.

targetTranslation: any unfair decrease (of what is due to them)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًا وَلَا هَضْمًا
ayahEnglish: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation.

targetTranslation: we sent it down (referring to قُرْءَانًا)
ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنٰهُ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur’ān and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance.

targetTranslation: a Quran/recitation (as the object being sent down in أَنزَلْنٰهُ)
ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنٰهُ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur’ān and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance.

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنٰهُ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur’ān and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance.

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنٰهُ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur’ān and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance.

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنٰهُ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur’ān and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance.

targetTranslation: a remembrance (object of أَنزَلْنٰهُ - We sent it down)
ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنٰهُ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur’ān and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance.

ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: So high [above all] is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muḥammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur’ān before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."

ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: So high [above all] is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muḥammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur’ān before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."

targetTranslation: before (of أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ - it being completed)
ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: So high [above all] is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muḥammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur’ān before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."

ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: So high [above all] is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muḥammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur’ān before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."

ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: So high [above all] is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muḥammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur’ān before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."
distractors: and he will come to Us

targetTranslation: my Lord! (addressing Allah directly with emphasis)
ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: So high [above all] is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muḥammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur’ān before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."

targetTranslation: increase for me! (command to increase knowledge for me)
ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: So high [above all] is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muḥammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur’ān before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."

ayahArabic: فَتَعٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahEnglish: So high [above all] is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muḥammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur’ān before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِىَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُۥ عَزْمًا
ayahEnglish: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِىَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُۥ عَزْمًا
ayahEnglish: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِىَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُۥ عَزْمًا
ayahEnglish: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِىَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُۥ عَزْمًا
ayahEnglish: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination.

targetTranslation: determination (object of نَجِدْ - we did not find)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِىَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُۥ عَزْمًا
ayahEnglish: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused.

targetTranslation: Iblis (as the subject being excepted from سَجَدُوٓا۟)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused.

ayahArabic: فَقُلْنَا يٰٓـَٔادَمُ إِنَّ هٰذَا عَدُوٌّ لَّكَ وَلِزَوْجِكَ فَلَا يُخْرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ فَتَشْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So We said, "O Adam, indeed this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Then let him not remove you from Paradise so you would suffer.

targetTranslation: he will surely expel you both
ayahArabic: فَقُلْنَا يٰٓـَٔادَمُ إِنَّ هٰذَا عَدُوٌّ لَّكَ وَلِزَوْجِكَ فَلَا يُخْرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ فَتَشْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: So We said, "O Adam, indeed this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Then let him not remove you from Paradise so you would suffer.

targetTranslation: that you become hungry (connected to أَلَّا meaning 'that not')
ayahArabic: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is [promised] for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعْرَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is [promised] for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed.

targetTranslation: you all become thirsty (in relation to لَا before it meaning 'not')
ayahArabic: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظْمَؤُا۟ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضْحَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun."

targetTranslation: you suffer from sun exposure (in relation to لَا تَظْمَؤُا۟ - you will not thirst)
ayahArabic: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظْمَؤُا۟ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضْحَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun."

ayahArabic: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ قَالَ يٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate?"

ayahArabic: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ قَالَ يٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate?"
distractors: and he got [both of] them out

ayahArabic: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ قَالَ يٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate?"

ayahArabic: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ قَالَ يٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate?"

targetTranslation: their (dual) private parts (referring to Adam and Eve)
ayahArabic: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they [i.e., Adam and his wife] ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred.

targetTranslation: they both patch/cover (referring to Adam and Eve)
ayahArabic: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they [i.e., Adam and his wife] ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred.

ayahArabic: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they [i.e., Adam and his wife] ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred.

targetTranslation: Adam (as the subject of عَصَىٰ - disobeyed)
ayahArabic: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they [i.e., Adam and his wife] ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred.

ayahArabic: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they [i.e., Adam and his wife] ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred.

targetTranslation: He chose him specially (subject of رَبُّهُۥ)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ ٱجْتَبٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ وَهَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him].

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ ٱجْتَبٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ وَهَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him].

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۢا بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend from it [i.e., Paradise] - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter].

targetTranslation: you two go down! (command for two people)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۢا بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend from it [i.e., Paradise] - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter].

targetTranslation: all together (describing how they should go down)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۢا بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend from it [i.e., Paradise] - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter].

targetTranslation: he loses/is losing the right way (subject of فَلَا)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۢا بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend from it [i.e., Paradise] - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter].

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۢا بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend from it [i.e., Paradise] - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter].

targetTranslation: he deliberately turned away (from ذِكْرِى - My remembrance)
ayahArabic: وَمَنْ أَعْرَضَ عَن ذِكْرِى فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِيشَةً ضَنكًا وَنَحْشُرُهُۥ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ أَعْمَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - indeed, he will have a depressed [i.e., difficult] life, and We will gather [i.e., raise] him on the Day of Resurrection blind."

targetTranslation: my remembrance (object of أَعْرَضَ عَن - turned away from)
ayahArabic: وَمَنْ أَعْرَضَ عَن ذِكْرِى فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِيشَةً ضَنكًا وَنَحْشُرُهُۥ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ أَعْمَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - indeed, he will have a depressed [i.e., difficult] life, and We will gather [i.e., raise] him on the Day of Resurrection blind."

targetTranslation: a way of life (as the object of لَهُ - he has)
ayahArabic: وَمَنْ أَعْرَضَ عَن ذِكْرِى فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِيشَةً ضَنكًا وَنَحْشُرُهُۥ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ أَعْمَىٰ

ayahEnglish: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - indeed, he will have a depressed [i.e., difficult] life, and We will gather [i.e., raise] him on the Day of Resurrection blind."

ayahEnglish: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - indeed, he will have a depressed [i.e., difficult] life, and We will gather [i.e., raise] him on the Day of Resurrection blind."

targetTranslation: blind (in relation to يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ - Day of Judgment)
ayahArabic: وَمَنْ أَعْرَضَ عَن ذِكْرِى فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِيشَةً ضَنكًا وَنَحْشُرُهُۥ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ أَعْمَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - indeed, he will have a depressed [i.e., difficult] life, and We will gather [i.e., raise] him on the Day of Resurrection blind."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِىٓ أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing?"

targetTranslation: O my Lord! (being called out to)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِىٓ أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِىٓ أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِىٓ أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِىٓ أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing?"

targetTranslation: seeing/understanding clearly (as a state of كُنتُ)
ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِىٓ أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكَ أَتَتْكَ ءَايٰتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ تُنسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot [i.e., disregarded] them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten."

targetTranslation: she came to you (referring to the signs/verses mentioned in ءَايٰتُنَا)
ayahArabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكَ أَتَتْكَ ءَايٰتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ تُنسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot [i.e., disregarded] them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten."

ayahArabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكَ أَتَتْكَ ءَايٰتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ تُنسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot [i.e., disregarded] them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten."

ayahArabic: قَالَ كَذٰلِكَ أَتَتْكَ ءَايٰتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ تُنسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot [i.e., disregarded] them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten."

targetTranslation: we repay (those who أَسْرَفَ - exceeded limits)
ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِنۢ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring.

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِنۢ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring.

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِنۢ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring.

targetTranslation: he believes (in آيٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ - signs of his Lord)
ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِنۢ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِنۢ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring.

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِنۢ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring.

ayahArabic: أَفَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِى مَسٰكِنِهِمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Then, has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them as they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs for those of intelligence.

targetTranslation: he guides (in a conditional or command context)
ayahArabic: أَفَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِى مَسٰكِنِهِمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Then, has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them as they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs for those of intelligence.

targetTranslation: how many (referring to أَهْلَكْنَا - we destroyed)
ayahArabic: أَفَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِى مَسٰكِنِهِمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ

ayahArabic: وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتْ مِن رَّبِّكَ لَكَانَ لِزَامًا وَأَجَلٌ مُّسَمًّى
ayahEnglish: And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it [i.e., punishment] would have been an obligation [due immediately], and [if not for] a specified term [decreed].

ayahArabic: وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتْ مِن رَّبِّكَ لَكَانَ لِزَامًا وَأَجَلٌ مُّسَمًّى
ayahEnglish: And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it [i.e., punishment] would have been an obligation [due immediately], and [if not for] a specified term [decreed].

ayahEnglish: And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it [i.e., punishment] would have been an obligation [due immediately], and [if not for] a specified term [decreed].

targetTranslation: as a binding necessity (predicate of كَانَ)
ayahArabic: وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتْ مِن رَّبِّكَ لَكَانَ لِزَامًا وَأَجَلٌ مُّسَمًّى

ayahEnglish: And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it [i.e., punishment] would have been an obligation [due immediately], and [if not for] a specified term [decreed].

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا وَمِنْ ءَانَآئِ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So be patient over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting; and during periods of the night [exalt Him] and at the ends of the day, that you may be satisfied.

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا وَمِنْ ءَانَآئِ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So be patient over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting; and during periods of the night [exalt Him] and at the ends of the day, that you may be satisfied.

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا وَمِنْ ءَانَآئِ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So be patient over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting; and during periods of the night [exalt Him] and at the ends of the day, that you may be satisfied.

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا وَمِنْ ءَانَآئِ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ
ayahEnglish: So be patient over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting; and during periods of the night [exalt Him] and at the ends of the day, that you may be satisfied.

targetTranslation: you will be pleased (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا وَمِنْ ءَانَآئِ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ

targetTranslation: you must definitely not extend (negative command with لا)
ayahArabic: وَلَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ زَهْرَةَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا لِنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ وَرِزْقُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [some] categories of them, [its being but] the splendor of worldly life by which We test them. And the provision of your Lord is better and more enduring.

targetTranslation: your two eyes (object of تَمُدَّنَّ - do not extend)
ayahArabic: وَلَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ زَهْرَةَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا لِنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ وَرِزْقُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰ

ayahEnglish: And do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [some] categories of them, [its being but] the splendor of worldly life by which We test them. And the provision of your Lord is better and more enduring.

targetTranslation: your family (object of وَأْمُرْ - and command)
ayahArabic: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا لَا نَسْـَٔلُكَ رِزْقًا نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ وَٱلْعٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness.

ayahArabic: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا لَا نَسْـَٔلُكَ رِزْقًا نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ وَٱلْعٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness.

targetTranslation: provision (object of نَسْـَٔلُكَ - we ask you for)
ayahArabic: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا لَا نَسْـَٔلُكَ رِزْقًا نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ وَٱلْعٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness.

ayahArabic: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا لَا نَسْـَٔلُكَ رِزْقًا نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ وَٱلْعٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness.

ayahArabic: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا لَا نَسْـَٔلُكَ رِزْقًا نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ وَٱلْعٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness.

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?

targetTranslation: that which (is written) (connects to فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ - in the scriptures)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ أَنَّآ أَهْلَكْنٰهُم بِعَذَابٍ مِّن قَبْلِهِۦ لَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا لَوْلَآ أَرْسَلْتَ إِلَيْنَا رَسُولًا فَنَتَّبِعَ ءَايٰتِكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن نَّذِلَّ وَنَخْزَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And if We had destroyed them with a punishment before him, they would have said, "Our Lord, why did You not send to us a messenger so we could have followed Your verses [i.e., teachings] before we were humiliated and disgraced?"

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ أَنَّآ أَهْلَكْنٰهُم بِعَذَابٍ مِّن قَبْلِهِۦ لَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا لَوْلَآ أَرْسَلْتَ إِلَيْنَا رَسُولًا فَنَتَّبِعَ ءَايٰتِكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن نَّذِلَّ وَنَخْزَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And if We had destroyed them with a punishment before him, they would have said, "Our Lord, why did You not send to us a messenger so we could have followed Your verses [i.e., teachings] before we were humiliated and disgraced?"

targetTranslation: our Lord (being addressed in قَالُوا they said)

ayahEnglish: And if We had destroyed them with a punishment before him, they would have said, "Our Lord, why did You not send to us a messenger so we could have followed Your verses [i.e., teachings] before we were humiliated and disgraced?"

ayahArabic: قُلْ كُلٌّ مُّتَرَبِّصٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلصِّرٰطِ ٱلسَّوِىِّ وَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Each [of us] is waiting; so wait. For you will know who are the companions of the sound path and who is guided."

ayahArabic: قُلْ كُلٌّ مُّتَرَبِّصٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلصِّرٰطِ ٱلسَّوِىِّ وَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Each [of us] is waiting; so wait. For you will know who are the companions of the sound path and who is guided."

targetTranslation: one who waits and watches intensively (subject of قُلْ)
ayahArabic: قُلْ كُلٌّ مُّتَرَبِّصٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلصِّرٰطِ ٱلسَّوِىِّ وَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Each [of us] is waiting; so wait. For you will know who are the companions of the sound path and who is guided."

targetTranslation: who (asking about the people who are أَصْحٰبُ ٱلصِّرٰطِ ٱلسَّوِىِّ)
ayahArabic: قُلْ كُلٌّ مُّتَرَبِّصٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلصِّرٰطِ ٱلسَّوِىِّ وَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Each [of us] is waiting; so wait. For you will know who are the companions of the sound path and who is guided."

ayahArabic: قُلْ كُلٌّ مُّتَرَبِّصٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلصِّرٰطِ ٱلسَّوِىِّ وَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
